# Phial of Galadriel ◆

> [!note] 📖 Attachment · Cost: **1** · Lore

![[505002.png]]

*Artifact. Item. Gift.*

---

Attach to a **_Hobbit_** hero.
**Response**: Discard Phial of Galadriel to cancel a shadow effect just triggered during an attack made by an enemy engaged with you. Give the attached hero +1 ATK and +1 DEF until the end of the phase.

---

> *“May it be a light to you in dark places, when all other lights go out.” —Galadriel, The Fellowship of the Ring*

**Pack:** [[ALeP - The Mirror of Galadriel]] #2
